languages.text: "Ты не получишь Себериана. Мы вместе вырвем Патент из твоих поганых лап, ксенос!"
"You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"
languages.original_text: "Ты не получишь Себериана. Мы вместе вырвем Патент из твоих поганых лап, ксенос!"

traits.locale_text: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall tear the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"
"You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall tear the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"
"You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"
"You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"
"You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"

languages.text: “你休想得到塞贝里安。我们会齐心协力，从你那肮脏的爪子里夺回贸易授状，异形！”
languages.original_text: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"

traits.locale_text: “你休想得到塞贝里安。我们会齐心协力，从你那肮脏的爪子里夺回贸易授状，异形！”

languages.text: «No te daré a Seberian. ¡Juntos arrancaremos la Patente de tus viles garras, xenos!».
languages.original_text: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"

traits.locale_text: «No te daré a Seberian. ¡Juntos arrancaremos la Patente de tus viles garras, xenos!».

languages.text: « Vous n'aurez pas Seberian. Nous vous reprendrons la lettre ensemble, vil xénos ! »
languages.original_text: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'aurez pas Seberian. Nous vous reprendrons la lettre ensemble, vil xénos ! »

languages.text: "Seberian'ı alamayacaksın. Ruhsatname'yi senin pis pençelerinden birlikte söküp alacağız zeno!"
languages.original_text: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ı alamayacaksın. Ruhsatname'yi senin pis pençelerinden birlikte söküp alacağız zeno!"

languages.text: "Ihr werdet Seberian nicht bekommen. Wir werden den Handelsbrief gemeinsam Euren unheiligen Klauen entreißen, Xenos!"
languages.original_text: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr werdet Seberian nicht bekommen. Wir werden den Handelsbrief gemeinsam Euren unheiligen Klauen entreißen, Xenos!"

languages.text: 「シベリアは手に入らない。我々は共に、その汚れた手から保証書を奪い取るぞ、異種族！」
languages.original_text: "You will not have Seberian. Together, we shall wrest the Warrant from your foul clutches, xenos!"

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアは手に入らない。我々は共に、その汚れた手から保証書を奪い取るぞ、異種族！」
